message.error: An error occurred while performing the action.

Home.title: Touch your memories
Home.video: Your browser does not support the video tag.

highlights.title: Pixea is simple and fast
highlights.description: We designed the whole ordering flow to be easy for everyone, from the first click to delivery of your finished order.

fast.title: Quick order completion
fast.description: You can complete your order in just a few straightforward steps.

intuitive.title: Intuitive user interface
intuitive.description: Our system is clear even for non-technical users, so placing an order feels natural.

delivery.title: Convenient delivery and pickup
delivery.description: Choose home delivery, pickup points, or personal collection based on what suits you best.

quality.title: Our standard and 10+ years of experience
quality.description: We keep high quality standards, have 10+ years of experience, and many happy returning customers.

delivery.title: We support popular delivery companies
delivery.description: We work with Packeta, DPD (including DPD Pickup), and SPS (including Balikovo), so you can choose the delivery option that works best for you.
delivery.branchPrefix: DPD Pickup and Balikovo are also supported at our company branch office at

privacy.title: GDPR, safety, and legal data handling
privacy.description: We process personal data and photos responsibly, transparently, and in compliance with legal requirements.

uploads.title: Uploaded photos deleted after 30 days
uploads.description: Original photo files uploaded for orders are deleted after 30 days.

previews.title: Previews deleted after 6 months
previews.description: Preview files of personal photos uploaded for orders are stored for a maximum of 6 months.

gdpr.title: GDPR-compliant processing
gdpr.description: We follow data minimization principles and limit processing to what is needed to fulfill your order.

protection.title: Security and trust
protection.description: We apply technical and organizational safeguards to protect your data throughout the process.

cta.title: Ready to place your order?
cta.description: Complete it in a few minutes and we will take care of quality printing and delivery.

Order.title: Order
Order.empty: Start your order by adding an item.
Order.fileTooLarge: This file is too large to be displayed.

Products.name: Name

Products.aiPromptUpdate: Describe what should be changed on this product
Products.aiPromptPlaceholder: Example: Canvas, 30x40 and 40x60 sizes, configuration including ...
Products.aiHelp: AI creates a draft JSON. Review it in the editor before saving.

Auth.title: Login
Auth.description: Sign in for order tracking and management, data prefilling and a better overall experience.
Auth.name: Full Name

adminWarning.bold: This tab is not for managing all received orders!
adminWarning.desc: This is the tab a casual customer sees. Therefore, a user with the "admin" role can use it for e.g. testing out the order process.
adminWarning.link: Open management of all received orders

orders.empty: Create your first order to see it here.

error.Configuration: We have encountered a configuration problem on our side. Please contact us if the problem persists.
error.AccessDenied: We have encountered an access problem on our side. Please contact us if the problem persists.
error.Verification: The provided verification code is invalid. Please try again.
error.Default: We have encountered an error. Please contact us if the problem persists.

AuthVerify.title: Verification
AuthVerify.description: We have sent an e-mail with verification code to {email}. Please copy and paste the code or type it below.

VerificationEmail.subject: Sign in to Pixea
VerificationEmail.preview: Use code {code} to verify your e-mail address and log in.
VerificationEmail.title: Login verification code
VerificationEmail.description: Your verification code is below - copy and paste or type it on the "Verification" screen to log in.
VerificationEmail.warning1: This code is only valid for 1 hour. After it expires, please request a new one.
VerificationEmail.warning2: If you did not request this e-mail, you can safely ignore it.

contact.title: Contact
contact.description: We are more than happy to answer any of your questions, help you out, or give advise.

404.title: Page not found
404.description: You either entered in a wrong URL or the page does not exist.
